query: We're submitting our React Native app to the App Store for the first time. What do we need to check?
expected_behavior: Produces a store compliance checklist with Apple-specific requirements (privacy manifest, NSUsageDescription keys, export compliance)
Checks that the app does not crash in Airplane Mode before submission
Checks that all primary actions are reachable with one thumb in the bottom 40% of the screen
Verifies the app launch time is under 200ms to interactive UI
Does not produce a generic 'test your app' checklist — produces specific, actionable items
